variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will anyone other than Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner win a major in 2026 (men's tennis)?

variables.name: non_duo_aus_open_winner
variables.description: True if the 2026 Australian Open (concluding Feb 1, 2026) is won by someone other than Alcaraz or Sinner.

variables.name: top_ten_non_duo_fitness
variables.description: Number of players ranked in the ATP Top 10 (excluding Alcaraz/Sinner) who are fit and competing in at least 3 Grand Slams in 2026.

variables.name: non_duo_slam_finalists
variables.description: The total number of Grand Slam finals in 2026 featuring at least one player who is NOT Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner.

variables.name: alcaraz_sinner_injury_withdrawal
variables.description: Total number of 2026 Grand Slam tournaments where either Alcaraz or Sinner withdraws or retires due to injury.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Lumina oral probiotic treatment reduce the rate of cavities by at least 50% in the 4 years after application?

variables.name: successful_colonization_rate
variables.description: The percentage of users who successfully establish a stable, long-term colony of S. mutans BCS3-L1 in their oral microbiome after application.

variables.name: lactic_acid_reduction_ratio
variables.description: The ratio of lactic acid production in the oral biofilm of colonized individuals compared to their baseline (pre-treatment) levels.

variables.name: study_publication_status
variables.description: Whether a peer-reviewed clinical trial or a formal white paper with a control group is published and accessible to the resolver by the time of evaluation.

variables.name: long_term_strain_dominance
variables.description: Whether the BCS3-L1 strain remains the dominant S. mutans variant in the mouth 4 years after application without being outcompeted by wild-type strains.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will  an attempt be made to fire Jerome Powell before the end of his term?

variables.name: white_house_legal_order
variables.description: The issuance of an official executive order, presidential directive, or formal letter from the White House explicitly stating that Jerome Powell is removed, terminated, or replaced as Chair of the Federal Reserve.

variables.name: doj_memo_on_removal_authority
variables.description: The publication or internal leaking of a formal Department of Justice (OLC) memorandum or a White House Counsel legal opinion concluding that the President has the authority to fire the Fed Chair for 'policy disagreement' rather than just 'for cause' (misconduct).

variables.name: inflation_exceeding_target
variables.description: The number of percentage points by which the Year-over-Year Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) Price Index exceeds the Fed's 2.0% target in the months leading up to May 2026, providing a 'for cause' pretext related to performance.

variables.name: public_presidential_ultimatum
variables.description: The number of times the President publicly issues a direct ultimatum on social media or in speeches specifically stating that Powell will be fired if interest rates are not cut by a specific amount or date.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: high_level_security_summits
variables.description: The number of formal security-focused ministerial summits or heads-of-state meetings involving at least three of the specified MENA countries held between February 2026 and May 2026.

variables.name: joint_military_exercise_participation
variables.description: The total number of distinct joint military exercises involving at least three of the specified MENA countries (e.g., Bright Star, Eager Lion) scheduled or completed in the first half of 2026.

variables.name: mena_security_framework_drafting
variables.description: Public confirmation or credible reporting of a draft framework for a new regional security architecture or collective defense mechanism involving the eligible MENA states prior to June 2026.

variables.name: regional_threat_index_consensus
variables.description: Whether a majority (9 or more) of the 17 listed MENA entities issue a joint statement identifying a common existential security threat (e.g., maritime piracy, non-state actors, or specific state aggression) by May 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the FDA have authorized a medical device that incorporates LLM-based functionality by 31 March 2026?

variables.name: fda_llm_guidance_finalized
variables.description: Whether the FDA has published a finalized guidance document specifically addressing the regulatory requirements for Large Language Models or Generative AI in medical devices by January 2026.

variables.name: premarket_submissions_llm
variables.description: The estimated number of 510(k) or De Novo submissions received by the FDA for devices explicitly utilizing LLM/generative AI functionality between January 2024 and December 2025.

variables.name: pccp_utilization_rate
variables.description: The percentage of AI/ML-enabled medical device submissions in 2025 that successfully incorporate a Predetermined Change Control Plan (PCCP) to manage iterative model updates.

variables.name: llm_ct_contrast_clearance
variables.description: Whether 'Contrast Llama' or a similar LLM-based foundational model for radiology (e.g., contrast agent detection) receives 510(k) clearance by March 31, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Russia capture Kostyantynivka by March 31?

variables.name: chasiv_yar_capture
variables.description: Binary indicator of whether Russian forces have established control over the entire city of Chasiv Yar. Capture of Chasiv Yar is a necessary operational prerequisite for a direct assault on Kostyantynivka from the east.

variables.name: distance_to_kostyantynivka_station
variables.description: The distance from the closest confirmed Russian-controlled territory to the Kostyantynivka railroad station as of March 1, 2026. This measures the remaining ground to be covered in the final month.

variables.name: pokrovsk_front_breakthrough
variables.description: Binary indicator of whether Russian forces have captured the city of Pokrovsk. A breakthrough in the Pokrovsk sector is often considered a prerequisite for flanking the Kostyantynivka-Kramatorsk-Slovyansk defensive line from the south.

variables.name: russian_daily_advance_rate
variables.description: The average daily rate of territorial advance by Russian forces in the Donetsk sector during the first quarter of 2026. This reflects the operational tempo required to reach the target location.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_battles_360d
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia during the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01.

variables.name: threshold_value
variables.description: The calculated threshold for the target outcome: 10 * (1 + (historical_battles_360d / 12)).

variables.name: conflict_escalation_index
variables.description: A score representing the intensity of armed conflict in Saudi Arabia or along its borders (e.g., Yemen) in early 2026.

variables.name: actual_battles_30d
variables.description: The total number of 'Battles' recorded in Saudi Arabia during the 30 days before 2026-02-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on February 1, 2026.

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_08
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on February 8, 2026.

variables.name: february_weekly_warming_trend
variables.description: The historical average temperature difference between February 8th and February 1st in Clermont-Ferrand over the last 30 years.

variables.name: synoptic_pattern_shift
variables.description: Whether a significant warm-air advection event or a shift from a polar/continental air mass to a maritime/tropical air mass occurs between the two dates.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: feb_01_avg_temp
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Pamandzi station on February 1st, 2026.

variables.name: feb_08_avg_temp
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Pamandzi station on February 8th, 2026.

variables.name: weekly_climatological_trend
variables.description: The typical change in average daily temperature at Pamandzi between the first and second week of February based on historical norms.

variables.name: synoptic_weather_variance
variables.description: The difference in average temperature caused by specific weather events (e.g., tropical depressions or cloud cover) on Feb 8 compared to Feb 1.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: ovx_initial_value
variables.description: The closing value of the CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index on February 1, 2026.

variables.name: crude_oil_price_volatility
variables.description: The realized 5-day annualized volatility of WTI crude oil futures between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026.

variables.name: geopolitical_risk_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant geopolitical event (e.g., conflict escalation, major sanctions) affecting oil supply regions between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026.

variables.name: ovx_weekly_change
variables.description: The net change in the OVX index from the close of Feb 1 to the close of Feb 8, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the price of Brent crude oil have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: brent_crude_price_start
variables.description: The daily price of Brent crude oil on 2026-02-01 as reported by FRED.

variables.name: weekly_price_volatility
variables.description: The absolute percentage change in the price of Brent crude oil over the 7-day period from Feb 1 to Feb 8.

variables.name: net_global_supply_shocks
variables.description: The net change in global daily oil supply due to geopolitical events or OPEC+ decisions announced between Feb 1 and Feb 8.

variables.name: usd_index_movement
variables.description: The directional change in the US Dollar Index (DXY) between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08, as an inverse driver of oil prices.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will CRL's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: s_and_p_500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between the market close on 2026-02-01 (or previous trading day) and 2026-02-08 (or previous trading day). This reflects the broad market beta impacting CRL.

variables.name: crl_relative_performance_to_market
variables.description: The idiosyncratic percentage return of CRL stock relative to the S&P 500 index over the same 7-day period. A positive value means CRL outperformed the index.

variables.name: crl_earnings_surprise_magnitude
variables.description: The difference between reported EPS and consensus analyst estimates if Charles River Laboratories releases its Q4 2025 earnings during this specific window (early February is their typical reporting time).

variables.name: biotech_sector_volatility_index
variables.description: The performance of the iShares Biotechnology ETF (IBB) relative to its 50-day moving average on 2026-02-08, serving as a proxy for sector-specific sentiment and capital flow into life sciences.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will R Praggnanandhaa have an Elo rating on 2026-02-08 that's at least 1% higher than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: initial_elo_rating
variables.description: Praggnanandhaa's FIDE Elo rating as listed on Wikipedia on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: net_elo_change
variables.description: The total change in Praggnanandhaa's Elo rating resulting from rated games played between the publication of the January 2026 list and the February 2026 list.

variables.name: wikipedia_update_latency
variables.description: The number of days after the 1st of February 2026 that it takes for the Wikipedia 'FIDE rankings' page to reflect the official February 1st FIDE rating list.

variables.name: participation_in_tata_steel
variables.description: Whether Praggnanandhaa participates in a major FIDE-rated tournament (like Tata Steel Chess) in January 2026, which is the primary driver for significant rating swings in that period.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will XOM's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: crude_oil_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the front-month Brent Crude oil futures price between Feb 1, 2026, and Feb 8, 2026. Exxon's stock price is highly correlated with global energy benchmarks.

variables.name: sp500_index_performance
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index from the market close on Feb 1, 2026, to the close on Feb 8, 2026, representing the broader market beta impact on XOM.

variables.name: q4_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The difference between XOM's reported earnings per share (EPS) for Q4 2025 (typically released late Jan/early Feb) and the consensus analyst estimate. This often triggers volatility in the first week of February.

variables.name: xom_relative_strength_index
variables.description: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) of XOM as of the market close on Feb 1, 2026. This technical indicator suggests whether the stock is overbought or oversold leading into the target week.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Barack Obama be arrested before July 2026?

variables.name: doj_formal_indictment_obama
variables.description: Whether the U.S. Department of Justice formally issues a criminal indictment against Barack Obama before July 2026.

variables.name: special_counsel_appointment_count
variables.description: The number of Special Counsels appointed by the Attorney General specifically to investigate Barack Obama or his direct staff for treason or election interference by June 2026.

variables.name: house_impeachment_inquiry_referrals
variables.description: The number of formal criminal referrals sent from House Committees to the DOJ regarding Barack Obama's conduct in the 2016 or 2020 elections before May 2026.

variables.name: dni_evidence_declassification_level
variables.description: The number of distinct tranches of declassified documents released by the ODNI specifically labeled as evidence of 'treasonous conspiracy' by the Obama administration before April 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Elon Musk be worth more than $1 Trillion by Jan 1st, 2029?

variables.name: tesla_market_cap_trillions
variables.description: The peak market capitalization of Tesla, Inc. between Feb 2026 and Jan 2029, which is the primary driver of Musk's net worth.

variables.name: spacex_valuation_billions
variables.description: The valuation of SpaceX based on secondary market sales or funding rounds by Jan 1, 2029.

variables.name: musk_tesla_ownership_percentage
variables.description: The percentage of Tesla equity owned by Elon Musk, accounting for any sales, dilution, or the outcome of legal challenges to his compensation packages.

variables.name: xai_valuation_billions
variables.description: The private valuation of Musk's AI company, xAI, which must grow significantly to bridge the gap to a $1 trillion personal net worth.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: government_control_erosion
variables.description: Binary indicator of whether the Malian government loses effective control over at least one major regional administrative capital (e.g., Segou or Mopti) to JNIM or allied forces prior to June 2026, signaling a collapse of the outer defensive perimeter for Bamako.

variables.name: jnim_operational_combatants
variables.description: The estimated number of active JNIM combatants mobilized for the final offensive on the Bamako metropolitan area. Taking a city of 3-4 million usually requires a significant concentration of force relative to the reported 6,000 total regional fighters.

variables.name: russian_africa_corps_presence
variables.description: The estimated number of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel actively deployed in Mali to support General Goita's government. A significant withdrawal or reduction in this force is a likely prerequisite for a successful JNIM takeover of the capital.

variables.name: bamako_supply_cutoff_duration
variables.description: The number of consecutive weeks that all primary ground supply routes (from Senegal and Côte d'Ivoire) remain effectively closed to commercial and fuel traffic due to JNIM activity, as a total blockade is a prerequisite for a city-wide capitulation.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Wagner Moura win the Academy Award for Best Actor at the 2026 Academy Awards?

variables.name: sag_award_best_actor
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the Screen Actors Guild Award for Outstanding Performance by a Male Actor in a Leading Role in 2026, which is the strongest precursor to an Oscar win.

variables.name: bafta_best_actor_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role in 2026, indicating strong support from the international/European voting bloc of the Academy.

variables.name: secret_agent_metacritic_score
variables.description: The final Metacritic score for the film 'The Secret Agent', representing the critical consensus which often correlates with Academy voter preferences.

variables.name: competitor_major_precursor_wins
variables.description: The total number of major televised precursor awards (SAG, BAFTA, Golden Globe) won by the other four nominees (Chalamet, DiCaprio, Hawke, Jordan) combined.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the United Nations Security Council adopt a resolution related to the conflict in Sudan by 1 May 2026?

variables.name: unsc_sudan_draft_submission
variables.description: Whether a draft resolution addressing the conflict in Sudan is formally introduced to the UN Security Council for a vote between February 15, 2026, and May 1, 2026.

variables.name: p5_consensus_on_humanitarian_access
variables.description: Whether the P5 members (China, France, Russia, UK, US) reach a consensus on at least one substantive humanitarian access or civilian protection measure for Sudan that avoids a veto.

variables.name: sudan_conflict_intensity_index
variables.description: A measure of the intensity of major offensive actions or reported mass casualty events in Sudan during the period; high values indicate high pressure for international intervention.

variables.name: days_until_sanctions_mandate_expiry
variables.description: The number of days remaining until the expiration of the current Sudan sanctions regime (established by Resolution 2791) as of May 1, 2026; if the mandate is extended early, this value remains high.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Israel win Eurovision 2026?

variables.name: israel_participation_confirmed
variables.description: Whether Israel officially confirms participation and is permitted by the EBU to compete in the 2026 Eurovision Song Contest.

variables.name: israel_grand_final_qualification
variables.description: Whether Israel successfully qualifies from the semi-finals to the Grand Final of Eurovision 2026.

variables.name: israel_televote_points_share
variables.description: The percentage share of total available televote points awarded to Israel in the Grand Final, which is critical for their winning path.

variables.name: israel_jury_score_rank
variables.description: The final ranking of Israel according to the professional jury vote; a high rank (low number) is usually a prerequisite for an overall win.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Alibaba have the best AI model at the end of February 2026?

variables.name: alibaba_top_arena_score
variables.description: The highest Elo arena score achieved by any Alibaba/Qwen model on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard by February 28, 2026.

variables.name: competitor_max_arena_score
variables.description: The maximum Elo arena score achieved by any non-Alibaba model (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard by February 28, 2026.

variables.name: qwen_3_release_status
variables.description: Whether Alibaba has publicly released a successor to the Qwen 2.5 series (e.g., Qwen 3 or a major 'Max' update) that is eligible for the Chatbot Arena leaderboard by the resolution date.

variables.name: gpu_cluster_scaling_factor
variables.description: The approximate size of the largest H100-equivalent GPU cluster available to Alibaba for training frontier models, normalized to units of 10,000 GPUs.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: baseline_protest_rate
variables.description: The average monthly number of 'Protests' in Azerbaijan over the 360 days preceding February 15, 2026.

variables.name: target_period_protest_count
variables.description: The total number of 'Protests' recorded in Azerbaijan during the 30-day period from January 23, 2026, to February 22, 2026.

variables.name: major_socio_political_unrest
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant national event (e.g., disputed election, economic collapse, or large-scale crackdown) that triggers mass mobilization during the target window.

variables.name: protest_threshold_multiplier
variables.description: The ratio of the protest count in the target 30-day window divided by (1 + the 360-day monthly average).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Brest Bretagne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-22 than on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: avg_temp_brest_feb_15
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Brest-Guipavas (07110) on 2026-02-15.

variables.name: avg_temp_brest_feb_22
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Brest-Guipavas (07110) on 2026-02-22.

variables.name: temp_difference_feb_22_minus_15
variables.description: The difference in average daily temperature between February 22nd and February 15th, 2026.

variables.name: is_positive_temperature_trend
variables.description: Whether the regional synoptic weather pattern over Brittany indicates a warming trend between mid and late February 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the euro short-term rate (volume-weighted trimmed mean), a measure of the borrowing costs of banks in the euro area, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: ecb_deposit_facility_rate_change
variables.description: Whether the European Central Bank (ECB) Governing Council announces or implements a change in the Deposit Facility Rate (DFR) between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: excess_liquidity_delta
variables.description: The net change in excess liquidity in the Eurosystem banking sector between the two target dates, which influences the spread of €STR relative to the DFR.

variables.name: estr_dfr_spread
variables.description: The spread between the euro short-term rate (€STR) and the ECB's Deposit Facility Rate (DFR) on 2026-02-22.

variables.name: market_volatility_index_vstoxx
variables.description: The level of the VSTOXX index (Euro Stoxx 50 Volatility) on 2026-02-22, serving as a proxy for financial stress that could drive up unsecured borrowing costs.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will Evgeniia Chikunova still hold the world record for 200m breaststroke in long course (50 metres) swimming pools on 2026-02-22?

variables.name: chikunova_record_duration_days
variables.description: The total number of days Evgeniia Chikunova's 2:17.55 record remains the fastest ratified time on Wikipedia between February 15, 2026, and February 22, 2026.

variables.name: major_long_course_meets_count
variables.description: Number of World Aquatics sanctioned long course meets occurring between February 1, 2026, and February 22, 2026, where a sub-2:17.55 performance is plausible.

variables.name: fastest_200m_breaststroke_time_2026
variables.description: The fastest time recorded globally in the women's 200m breaststroke (long course) during the first two months of 2026.

variables.name: ratified_record_update_on_wikipedia
variables.description: Whether Wikipedia editors have updated the World Record list to reflect a new ratified record if one occurred prior to the resolution date.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market yield on US treasury securities at 3-month constant maturity, quoted on an investment basis, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: fed_funds_target_change
variables.description: The change in the upper bound of the Federal Open Market Committee's target range for the federal funds rate between Feb 1, 2026, and Feb 22, 2026.

variables.name: expected_inflation_breakeven_delta
variables.description: The change in the 5-year breakeven inflation rate (T5YIE) between Feb 15 and Feb 22, 2026, serving as a proxy for shifts in inflation expectations.

variables.name: treasury_bill_supply_increase
variables.description: Whether the total outstanding amount of 13-week (3-month) US Treasury bills increases during the week ending Feb 22, 2026, relative to the previous week.

variables.name: market_yield_volatility_index
variables.description: The value of the ICE BofA MOVE Index (a measure of Treasury market volatility) on Feb 20, 2026 (the final trading day before Feb 22).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Heartland virus disease by 2026-02-22?

variables.name: human_clinical_trial_initiation
variables.description: Whether a Phase I clinical trial for a Heartland virus vaccine has officially commenced and been documented in public registries by the target date.

variables.name: fda_or_equivalent_approval
variables.description: Whether any national regulatory body (like the FDA) has granted emergency use authorization or full licensure for a Heartland virus vaccine.

variables.name: wikipedia_vaccine_column_update
variables.description: The number of infectious diseases on the Wikipedia 'List of infectious diseases' page that have their 'Vaccine' column updated from 'No' or 'Under development' to 'Yes' between 2024 and 2026.

variables.name: total_heartland_virus_publications
variables.description: The cumulative number of peer-reviewed scientific publications indexed on PubMed specifically regarding Heartland virus vaccine research (in hundreds).

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will LVS's market close price on 2026-02-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: weekly_market_return_sp500
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between the market close on 2026-02-13 and 2026-02-20, representing general market conditions during the target week.

variables.name: lvs_beta_coefficient
variables.description: The 5-year monthly beta of Las Vegas Sands Corp. relative to the market, indicating its expected sensitivity to broad market movements.

variables.name: macao_gaming_revenue_trend
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in Macao's Gross Gaming Revenue (GGR) for the most recently reported month prior to 2026-02-22, which drives LVS's fundamental value.

variables.name: lvs_specific_news_shock
variables.description: Whether a major idiosyncratic positive news event (e.g., dividend increase, license renewal, or earnings beat) occurs specifically for LVS during the observation week.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: jnim_combatant_count_sahel
variables.description: The estimated number of active JNIM combatants across the Sahel region (Mali, Burkina Faso, Niger) as of early 2026. A significant surge in manpower is a prerequisite for assaulting a major capital.

variables.name: malian_government_collapse_incident
variables.description: A major internal destabilization event, such as a successful coup, the assassination of General Assimi Goita, or a massive military mutiny, that severely compromises the defense of Bamako.

variables.name: russian_africa_corps_withdrawal
variables.description: Whether Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel significantly reduce their presence or withdraw from the Bamako defense perimeter, leaving a security vacuum.

variables.name: bamako_fuel_supply_index
variables.description: The average daily fuel availability in Bamako relative to normal levels (pre-September 2025). A value near 0 indicates total blockade success, making city defense untenable.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will BLK's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: Weekly percentage change in the S&P 500 Index between the close on 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08, representing the broader market beta.

variables.name: blk_beta_to_sp500
variables.description: The historical sensitivity of BlackRock's stock price relative to the S&P 500, which determines how much the stock amplifies market movements.

variables.name: financial_sector_relative_strength
variables.description: The performance of the Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLF) relative to the S&P 500 during this specific week, indicating sector-specific tailwinds or headwinds.

variables.name: idiosyncratic_news_impact
variables.description: Binary indicator of whether BlackRock experiences a company-specific event (such as an earnings surprise, major acquisition, or regulatory announcement) that moves the stock price by more than 2% independently of the market.
